reasoning: Without access to live data for the 2025 season (due to no search tool being available) and failing to fetch the Manifold market data without a specific ID, my baseline probability relies on reference class forecasting and expected team strength. There are 32 NFL teams, giving an unconditional base rate of 1/32 (~3.1%). The 49ers have been one of the stronger teams in the NFL recently, consistently appearing in division championships and playoffs. Even with uncertainty stretching into the 2025 season, pre-season and mid-season odds for elite teams usually hover between +500 and +1200 (approx. 8% to 15% implied probability). Accounting for the natural regression to the mean and potential mid-season variance by November 2025, an expected probability of 9% represents a premium above the average NFL team, reflecting their historically strong roster management while acknowledging the high variance of NFL seasons and playoffs.
